summary:
Recovery: Poor

Reading: State
Poor
Recovery 46 • Sleep 72 • Strain —

Read
Recovery is running low as the workout window opens, with enough sleep but little sign of full readiness. Intake so far leaves muscle support underbuilt, so the day favors a measured resistance session over intensity or extra burn.

Measured strength, not strain.

Performance: Measured strength, not strain.

Transit: none
